node.title: Any one has given Uber onsite rounds recently for Amsterdam location ?

topic.title: Any one has given Uber onsite rounds recently for Amsterdam location ?

post.content: Any one has given onsite rounds recently in Uber for Amsterdam location ? I have cleared the online test then recruiter is asking me for interview rounds, any one has any leads? do we get direct LC questions ?
Hey OP, can you please tell us what kind of rounds you had for Amsterdam, and for which role?
Hello would you update us please
No idea, I have my OA this week, would you mind sharing your the questions of the oa?
